---
title: "Data Explorer"
---

```{=html}
<div id="explorer-app">
  <div id="sidebar">
    <div id="controls">
      <select id="system-select">
        <option value="cow">Correlates of War (COW)</option>
        <option value="gw">Gleditsch-Ward (GW + microstates)</option>
      </select>
      <input type="text" id="search-box" placeholder="Filter countries...">
      <span id="country-count"></span>
    </div>
    <div id="country-list"></div>
  </div>

  <div id="main-panel">
    <div id="welcome-msg">
      <p>Select a country to view its diplomatic status timeline.</p>
    </div>
    <div id="timeline-panel">
      <h3 id="timeline-title"></h3>
      <div id="timeline-bar-wrap">
        <div id="timeline-bar"></div>
        <div id="timeline-labels"></div>
      </div>
      <div id="timeline-legend"></div>
      <table id="timeline-table">
        <thead><tr><th>Start</th><th>End</th><th>Duration</th><th>Status</th><th>USDOS Name</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody id="timeline-tbody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const STATUS_COLORS = {
    "Embassy": "#1b5e20",
    "Ambassador Nonresident": "#388e3c",
    "Legation": "#2196f3",
    "Envoy Nonresident": "#64b5f6",
    "Consulate": "#f57c00",
    "Consul Nonresident": "#ffb74d",
    "Liaison": "#7b1fa2",
    "Interests": "#ce93d8",
    "None": "#bdbdbd"
  };

  const STATUS_ORDER = [
    "Embassy", "Ambassador Nonresident", "Legation", "Envoy Nonresident",
    "Consulate", "Consul Nonresident", "Liaison", "Interests", "None"
  ];

  const data = /* __EXPLORER_DATA__ */null;
  let currentSystem = "cow";
  let selectedAbbrev = null;

  const getEl = id => document.getElementById(id);

  function renderList() {
    const sys = data[currentSystem];
    if (!sys) return;
    const search = getEl("search-box").value.toLowerCase().trim();
    const entries = Object.entries(sys)
      .map(([abbrev, info]) => ({abbrev, ...info}))
      .filter(e => {
        if (!search) return true;
        return e.name.toLowerCase().includes(search)
          || e.abbrev.toLowerCase().includes(search)
          || String(e.code).includes(search);
      })
      .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));

    getEl("country-count").textContent = entries.length + " countries";

    const list = getEl("country-list");
    list.innerHTML = "";
    for (const e of entries) {
      const item = document.createElement("div");
      item.className = "country-item" + (e.abbrev === selectedAbbrev ? " selected" : "");
      item.innerHTML = '<span class="country-name">' + e.name + '</span>'
        + '<span class="country-code">' + e.abbrev + '</span>';
      item.addEventListener("click", function() { showTimeline(e.abbrev); });
      list.appendChild(item);
    }
  }

  function showTimeline(abbrev) {
    const sys = data[currentSystem];
    const info = sys[abbrev];
    if (!info) return;

    selectedAbbrev = abbrev;
    renderList();

    getEl("welcome-msg").style.display = "none";
    const panel = getEl("timeline-panel");
    panel.style.display = "block";
    getEl("timeline-title").textContent =
      info.name + " (" + abbrev + ", " + currentSystem.toUpperCase() + " " + info.code + ")";

    const ranges = info.ranges;
    const minDate = new Date(ranges[0].start);
    const maxDate = new Date(ranges[ranges.length - 1].end);
    const totalMs = maxDate - minDate;

    // Timeline bar
    const bar = getEl("timeline-bar");
    bar.innerHTML = "";
    for (const r of ranges) {
      const start = new Date(r.start);
      const end = new Date(r.end);
      const leftPct = ((start - minDate) / totalMs) * 100;
      const widthPct = ((end - start) / totalMs) * 100;

      const seg = document.createElement("div");
      seg.className = "timeline-segment";
      seg.style.left = leftPct + "%";
      seg.style.width = Math.max(widthPct, 0.3) + "%";
      seg.style.backgroundColor = STATUS_COLORS[r.status] || "#999";
      const usdos = r.usdos ? " (" + r.usdos + ")" : "";
      seg.title = r.status + ": " + r.start + " to " + r.end + usdos;
      bar.appendChild(seg);
    }

    // Year axis
    const labels = getEl("timeline-labels");
    labels.innerHTML = "";
    const startYear = minDate.getFullYear();
    const endYear = maxDate.getFullYear();
    const span = endYear - startYear;
    const step = span <= 20 ? 5 : span <= 50 ? 10 : span <= 100 ? 20 : 25;
    const firstTick = Math.ceil(startYear / step) * step;
    for (let y = firstTick; y <= endYear; y += step) {
      const d = new Date(y, 0, 1);
      const pct = ((d - minDate) / totalMs) * 100;
      if (pct >= 0 && pct <= 100) {
        const lbl = document.createElement("span");
        lbl.className = "timeline-label";
        lbl.style.left = pct + "%";
        lbl.textContent = y;
        labels.appendChild(lbl);
      }
    }

    // Detail table
    const tbody = getEl("timeline-tbody");
    tbody.innerHTML = "";
    for (const r of ranges) {
      const tr = document.createElement("tr");
      const color = STATUS_COLORS[r.status] || "#999";
      const start = new Date(r.start);
      const end = new Date(r.end);
      const days = Math.round((end - start) / 86400000) + 1;
      const years = (days / 365.25).toFixed(1);
      const duration = days < 365 ? days + "d" : years + "y";
      tr.innerHTML = "<td>" + r.start + "</td><td>" + r.end
        + "</td><td>" + duration
        + '</td><td><span class="status-dot" style="background:' + color + '"></span> ' + r.status
        + "</td><td>" + (r.usdos || "") + "</td>";
      tbody.appendChild(tr);
    }

    // Legend
    const usedStatuses = new Set(ranges.map(r => r.status));
    getEl("timeline-legend").innerHTML = STATUS_ORDER
      .filter(s => usedStatuses.has(s))
      .map(s => '<span class="legend-item"><span class="legend-color" style="background:'
        + STATUS_COLORS[s] + '"></span>' + s + '</span>')
      .join(" ");
  }

  getEl("system-select").addEventListener("change", function(e) {
    currentSystem = e.target.value;
    selectedAbbrev = null;
    getEl("timeline-panel").style.display = "none";
    getEl("welcome-msg").style.display = "block";
    renderList();
  });

  getEl("search-box").addEventListener("input", function() {
    renderList();
  });

  renderList();
})();
</script>
```
